questionHtml: Based on these experimental results, suggest one advantage of immobilizing lipase.
markschemeHtml:
a. it increases the range of temperature/pH that give high activity ✔ 

b. allows for commercial use in detergents ✔

meta.title: Based on these experimental results, suggest one advantage of immobilizing lipase.
